author: Komputer Mechanic
title: OpenClaw YouTube Analytics
summary: Full YouTube analytics skill for OpenClaw. Pulls rich channel and video data from the YouTube Data API (public, any channel) and your own dashboard-level analytics via the YouTube Analytics API (OAuth2). Covers views, watch time, traffic sources, geography, devices, demographics, revenue, and more — no need to open YouTube Studio.

public.description: Works on any YouTube channel. Great for competitor research.

analytics.description: Your own channel only. Dashboard-level data: impressions, CTR, watch time, traffic sources, demographics, revenue.
